news.t: Unlimited ETFs to Transfer Exchange Listings to New York Stock Exchange

overview.description: The Unlimited HFMF Managed Futures ETF (HFMF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund is an actively managed ETF that seeks capital appreciation by outperforming the hedge fund industry's Managed Futures sector, targeting 2x more volatility. The fund uses futures contracts to manage volatility. HFMF was launched on Jul 14, 2025 and is issued by Unlimited.

data.title: Unlimited ETFs to Transfer Exchange Listings to New York Stock Exchange
data.text: NEW YORK, Dec. 29, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Unlimited ETFs, along with Tidal Financial Group, today announced that two of its ETFs — the Unlimited HFMF Managed Futures ETF (NYSE Arca: HFMF) and the Un...
